CORRECT.question: Who discovered the phenomenon of radioactive decay chains?
CORRECT.model_response: Ernest Rutherford and Frederick Soddy discovered the phenomenon of radioactive decay chains around 1902. They demonstrated that radioactivity was a process in which atoms of one element spontaneously transmuted into atoms of a different element, forming a series of decays.

WRONG.model_response:
The highest peak in Bangladesh is Saka Haphong, with an elevation of approximately 1,052 meters (3,451 feet).

While Saka Haphong is widely considered the highest based on modern GPS data, it is not officially recognized by the government of Bangladesh. The officially recognized highest peak is Tazing Dong.
